plugins.name: terraform-module-steering
plugins.description: Steering-document generator + spec-driven orchestrator for secure-by-default Terraform modules — new builds and safe changes to existing modules (backward-compat + semver). Per-service CIS/FSBP research, wrap proven upstream modules, minimal inputs, hardcoded non-overridable security, and a fmt/validate/tflint/checkov/test verification pipeline. Local content only (no git operations).
